source.title: dispatch.sh: surface Codex HTTP 4xx/5xx errors instead of silent 0-token success

label: negative

alternative_route.model: supported codex/openai model or preflight rejection

outcome.summary: HTTP 400 model-not-supported was swallowed; orchestrator surfaced 15/15 skipped and 0/0 tokens as superficially normal.

quality_signal.value: error surfacing + preflight shipped; 28 bats tests + E2E smoke

missing_fields: preflight pass/fail as structured route feature

source.title: orchestrate.py: distinguish PASS / WARN / FAIL in summary counts

alternative_route.governor: WARN blocks or triggers review before phase advance

outcome.summary: 9 of 15 WARN / NEEDS_ATTENTION verdicts displayed as Passed: 15, Failed/Skipped: 0, almost causing premature phase advance.

source.title: Fix default get_screen format from full to compact

outcome.summary: Default full returns per-cell JSON at about 12K tokens; agents using default overflow by turn 6-7.

chosen_route.topology: flux-drive without visible Phase 2.5 reaction round

outcome.summary: Compact skill silently dropped Phase 2.5 reaction orchestration; consolidation removed compact and surfaced Phase 2.5 explicitly.

quality_signal.value: 152 structural tests unchanged; manual flux-drive reaction round confirmed

chosen_route.topology: new AGE/Cypher ontology module without cross-reference to interweave

outcome.summary: Two ontology systems in flight; resolved by subsuming F2 into lattice, dropping AGE/Cypher, deleting duplicate core/interweave.

chosen_route.topology: per-client statusline shellouts: 151 clients x 2 scripts / 5s

alternative_route.topology: single cache daemon + thin readers + longer status interval

outcome.summary: Per-client polling caused fork storm; cache daemon removed per-tick fork storm.

source.title: Auraken Opus 4.7 model audit + refresh pinned IDs

alternative_route.model_map: refresh sonnet->4.6, opus->4.7; decide explicit high-complexity Opus route

outcome.summary: Mechanical model ID refresh shipped; high-complexity Opus routing deferred under Auraken->Hermes pivot.

quality_signal.value: mechanical fix committed; route policy deferred

source.title: Fix flux-review Opus 4.7 refusal triggers + anti_overlap bug + Sonnet fallback

task_features.risk: provider policy refusal under prompt topology

chosen_route.topology: multi-agent orchestration + first-person persona + AI-lab targeting + self-referential influence framing

alternative_route.prompt_policy: apply-perspective framing and remove influence verbs

outcome.summary: Track A and D refused while B/C succeeded; fixed prompt framing, string handling, synthetic refusal detection, and auto-fallback.

source.title: B2 routing infrastructure exists but production callers missing

chosen_route.routing_state: B2 complexity infra built but dispatch points do not consume signals

alternative_route.routing_state: flux-drive, quality-gates, sprint-compose inject raw complexity signals in shadow mode first

outcome.summary: B2 complexity-aware routing has zero production callers; magy blocks on 2aqs.

alternative_route.policy: keep complexity.mode shadow until quality-preserving savings proven

outcome.summary: 129 flux-ish sessions with tokens; projected role-aware policy increased cost by $31.7037 (-27.3% savings), so script recommends keeping shadow mode.

quality_signal.value: no paired quality labels; cost-only projection

chosen_route.collection: verdict_outcome events exist but many use model_used=unknown and findings_count=0

alternative_route.collection: record model, dispatch_id, acted_on, dismissed, severity, bead_id, route proposal

outcome.summary: Interspect has 1314 evidence rows and 20 verdict_outcome rows; 11 verdict outcomes contain unknown model, limiting calibration use.

source.title: Activate cross-model dispatch — switch from shadow to enforce mode

chosen_route.policy: qualified non-Claude for checker-tier agents; safety agents stay Sonnet+

outcome.summary: Enforce mode activated with 13 integration tests; safety floors verified.

quality_signal.value: tests passed and safety floors verified

source.title: Experiment: confidence cascade with multi-model waterfall

chosen_route.topology: smallest model first; escalate by first-3-token average probability

outcome.summary: Defines explicit confidence cascade and latency budget as route guard.

cost_observed.latency_budget: cascade must not be slower than just calling big model

chosen_route.topology: anomaly evaluator -> fast-path/streak -> Interspect confirmation -> CONSTRAIN/release -> weight write

outcome.summary: Pure signal layers composed into real trigger path; policy/governor authorizes constraint actions rather than raw confidence.
